description: A quarterly earnings reporting period is approaching, and historical traffic patterns show 4x normal load. Without priority classes, critical payment processing pods could be evicted in favor of batch analytics jobs during resource pressure. Implement a 4-tier PriorityClass system and assign the correct priority tiers to the existing workloads in the 'staging' namespace of the local cluster, following the specification at /home/ga/Desktop/priority_tier_spec.yaml. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!.
